summary: Complete testing of Parking Page rewrite. All core features working: parking spots CRUD, timeline view, tenant assignments, manage section. Backend APIs 11/11 passing. Frontend UI verified with Playwright.

issues: Console hydration warnings about span elements inside table elements - caused by React dev tools injection, not actual code issue

critical_code_review_comments: Parking page completely rewritten with calendar-like timeline UI
ParkingSpotDialog correctly shows different forms for designated vs marlins/city decal spots
Designated spots have Spot #, Location, and Needs Tag toggle
Marlins/City Decal spots have Decal # and Year fields
Timeline shows assignment bars with tenant NAME and UNIT # (e.g., 'Jonathen | 7')
Manage Parking Spots section is collapsible with edit/delete buttons
Assign dialog filters tenants by date overlap and building
TenantDetailDialog and TenantDetailModal both fetch and display parking assignments
PropertyCard no longer shows decals section
All data-testid attributes properly set for testing
passed_tests: Parking page loads with empty state when no spots exist
Add Spot dialog opens and can create both designated and marlins/city decal spots
Designated spot form shows Spot #, Location, Needs Tag toggle
Marlins/City Decal spot form shows Decal #, Year
Created spots appear on the timeline as rows
Assignment bars show tenant name and unit number on the calendar timeline (e.g., 'Jonathen | 7')
Manage Parking Spots section is collapsible and shows all spots with edit/delete buttons
Spots can be edited from the Manage Spots section
Clicking on timeline opens assign dialog with date pre-filled
Assign dialog shows building filter and tenant list filtered by selected dates
Assign dialog shows only tenants whose stay overlaps selected dates
Assignments can be created and appear on the timeline
Clicking on assignment bar opens edit dialog
GET /api/parking/timeline returns spots with enriched assignments
GET /api/parking-assignments?tenant_id=xxx returns assignments for a specific tenant
CRUD operations work for parking spots: POST, PUT, DELETE /api/parking-spots
CRUD operations work for parking assignments: POST, PUT, DELETE /api/parking-assignments
Tenant form (add/edit) does NOT have 'has_parking' checkbox
Properties form does NOT have marlins_decal_property toggle
Today marker visible on the parking timeline
Scroll left/right and Today buttons work on the timeline
seed_data_creation: Created 2 parking spots (Spot #A1 designated with needs_tag, Decal #D123 marlins/city decal) and 1 assignment for Jonathen
context_for_next_testing_agent: Parking page fully tested. Key data-testids: parking-page, parking-page-title, parking-add-spot-btn, parking-scroll-left, parking-scroll-today, parking-scroll-right, parking-timeline-card, parking-timeline-scroll, parking-spot-row, parking-spot-assign-btn, parking-assignment-bar, parking-manage-toggle, parking-spots-list-item, parking-spot-edit-btn, parking-spot-delete-btn, parking-spot-type-toggle, parking-spot-number, parking-spot-needs-tag, parking-decal-number, parking-spot-save, parking-assign-start, parking-assign-end, parking-assign-building-trigger, parking-assign-search, parking-assign-tenant-list, parking-assign-tenant-option, parking-assign-notes, parking-assign-save, tenant-parking-assignment, tenant-parking-note. Backend API endpoints: /api/parking/timeline, /api/parking-spots, /api/parking-assignments.
